headline: 3 Dividend Stocks To Consider With Yields Up To 10.2%
summary: Over the last 7 days, the United States market has experienced a 3.3% drop, although it remains up by 22% over the past year with earnings forecasted to grow by 17% annually. In this context, dividend stocks can offer a compelling investment opportunity, providing potential income streams alongside capital appreciation in a fluctuating market environment.

headline: Rosenblatt Remains a Buy On Palantir Technologies (PLTR)

headline: EigenQ Names Rika Nakazawa Chief Growth Officer to Accelerate Global Expansion
summary: EigenQ today announced the appointment of global technology executive Rika Nakazawa as Chief Growth Officer, strengthening the company's leadership team as it expands its AI, cybersecurity, and quantum infrastructure business.

headline: Accenture (ACN) Faces Lower Price Target from TD Cowen as Industry Challenges Persist
summary: With a TTM operating cash flow of $13.08 billion, Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) is included among the 12 Cash-Rich Stocks to Buy Right Now. On June 8, TD Cowen lowered its price recommendation on Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) to $258 from $282. It reiterated a Buy rating on the stock. The firm said both Accenture and the broader services […]
